name: Keith Ellison
subject: Derek, I promise
body:
Let's start August with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our deadline tomorrow to help elect Democrats in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523027/4067b0a/320d24ea3/7e6c104a/1583504142/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170730_ke_nd&source=em_20170730_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170730_ke_nd")**

Bad things happen when Democrats lose elections, Derek.

Trump and his Republican cronies in Congress have scratched and clawed at almost every bit of progress this country has made. They've attacked affordable health care and Medicaid, threatened decades of progress to make our military diverse by announcing a ban on transgender Americans from serving, and launched an all-out assault on our right to vote.

We've got to turn things around, Derek, but we don't have to wait until the next presidential election to do it. **[The fight to get our country back on track has already started with elections at the state and local level. Chip in $3 or more before our deadline tomorrow to help elect Democrats who will keep the GOP in check.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523027/4067b0a/320d24ea3/7e6c104b/1583504142/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+The+fight+to+get+our+country+back+on+tra&utm_campaign=em_20170730_ke_nd&source=em_20170730_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170730_ke_nd")**

Here's just one way we're already doing it -- we're making a significant investment in this year's elections in Virginia.

With more organizers on the ground, additional digital, tech, and data resources, and training to help get our party's message out, we're giving every Democrat on the ballot a leg up.

The single best thing we can do to stop Trump and the GOP is to elect Democrats -- this year, next year, and beyond. But we're relying on our best grassroots supporters like you to make sure we can make the investments that it takes to win.

Chip in $3 or more before the fundraising deadline tomorrow night to help Democrats compete and win in every state. I promise that what you do will make a difference.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523027/4067b0a/320d24ea3/7e6c1048/1583504142/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170730_ke_nd&source=em_20170730_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170730_ke_nd")

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523027/4067b0a/320d24ea3/7e6c1051/1583504142/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170730_ke_nd&source=em_20170730_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170730_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, First President Trump tried to restrict access to health care. Now he's also trying to restrict access to the ballot box. Trump's voter commission is nothing more than a disgraceful attempt to disenfranchise eligible voters. **And the commission intends to build its voter database with your private information at taxpayer expense.** Thousands of Americans have voiced their concerns, and dozens of states have refused to comply with this reckless request for information. Heading the commission is none other than Kris Kobach, the man that the ACLU dubbed the 'King of Voter Suppression'. [_**This commission is nothing more than a veiled attempt to rollback our voting rights. Call for its immediate disbandment.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113edd/622b7b5b/4c5e74f/307bdf66/2315847260/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170726k") Taxpayers are being forced to bankroll a commission that was formed to cover up Trump's lies about voter fraud. Not only could our private information be jeopardized by the commission, but it could be used against us. **Trump 's commission is stacked with officials and politicians like Kris Kobach who have championed voter suppression.** This commission is a springboard for them to take their efforts nationwide. [_**We cannot, in good faith, allow the work of this commission to continue. Add your name to stop the commission once and for all.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113edd/622b7b5b/4c5e74f/307bdf66/2315847260/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170726k") Thank you, Debbie |

name: Team Kaine
subject: one more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek -- We have just one more day before July's end-of-month deadline. One more day to make sure we hit our goal. And one more day to do what we can to make sure we have the resources to win this thing.

It's as simple as this: We can't afford to lose this seat. Just think, Friday's vote on repealing the Affordable Care Act was defeated 49-51. **With just one more Republican senator, millions of Americans would be on the brink of losing their health insurance.**

Trump and his allies are going to do whatever it takes to try and replace Tim with someone who will fast-track their agenda. **[_Will you chip in $5 to help us hit our $60,000 end-of-month goal so we can keep Tim in the Senate?_](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NQ9myeSuyF9%2BVyx9ffj1VqCkWlTLxgk1)**

Standing up for Virginians has a price. Republicans and dark money groups spent about $30 million against Tim in 2012, and they'll redouble their efforts in this election. They already have a candidate who's promised to wage a "vicious and ruthless campaign" \-- and who's ready to work hand-in-hand with Trump to destroy so much of what we've worked for.

You can't let them succeed, Derek. It's time to step up. **[_Before tomorrow 's end-of-month deadline, will you chip in $5 to keep our champion for Virginia working for us in Washington?_](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GpqgcLJunDI5jQGlHS1%2F2KCkWlTLxgk1)**

Thanks,

Team Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NWJKDmYJxcs88W42qZDzUaCkWlTLxgk1)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ckVIgrizHmF8vncnms7D06CkWlTLxgk1).

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: All Because of You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Friend,

After weeks of secret, closed door meetings, Republicans in the Senate dramatically failed -- by a single vote -- to pass their plan to strip away affordable health care from tens of millions of Americans in order to give tax breaks to the powerful few.
This victory in preserving access to health care would not have been possible without your activism and the activism of overwhelming numbers of engaged Americans. I want to take a moment to thank you, and other advocates from around the country, for stopping the GOP Wealthcare plan.
While Senators Collins, Murkowski and McCain did the right thing, 49 Republican senators -- including 9 who are up for election in the 2018 cycle -- voted repeatedly for proposals that would do grave damage to our entire health care system.
[We must support our Democratic Senate candidates who will hold these nine Republican senators accountable in 2018. Donate here to make sure we have the resources to ensure Republicans face consequences at the ballot box for their highly irresponsible votes. >>](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bce/70cdc2ba/46848c3f/397c165/3573171813/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/healthcarevictory30?refcode=em073017&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+must+support+our+Democratic+Senate+ca&utm_campaign=em073017&source=em073017") All but three Republicans have proven that they care more about the wishes of powerful corporations and right-wing billionaire donors than a public and a medical community almost unanimously unified against this cruel bill. The time is now to stand up and make sure that Senate Republicans up for election in 2018 are held accountable for their votes to put the lives and livelihood of millions of Americans at risk.
[Donate here to give us the resources necessary to make sure Republican Senators face consequences in 2018 for supporting proposals that would inflict terrible harm on our fellow Americans. >>>](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bce/70cdc2ba/46848c3f/397c162/3573171813/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/healthcarevictory30?refcode=em073017&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Donate+here+to+give+us+the+resources+nec&utm_campaign=em073017&source=em073017")
Onwards! Chris Van Hollen
> > >

---

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: How EMILY's List women are resisting in the Senate >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6548/24c69fd9/bdad14b6/18992f25/898286877/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE746N_digital_email_20170730_EOMPatty_inact&source=WQEFE746N_digital_email_20170730_EOMPatty_inact")
---

Peter,

Thought you couldn't love Senator Patty Murray any more? Think again.

The highest ranking Democratic woman in the Senate slammed an education department official who recently victim-blamed campus sexual assault survivors and said that 90 percent of accusations "fall into the category of 'we were both drunk.'"

Without hesitation, Patty called for her resignation.

When we elect progressive women, this is the kind of advocacy we get on our behalf -- unwavering, unrelenting, unapologetic. At no time was that clearer than last week, when our Senate women remained a strong, united front in opposition to Trumpcare.

**[Want more leadership like this in Congress? Donate $3 to support our women and help meet our $125,000 End-of-Month fundraising goal.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6548/24c69fd9/bdad14b6/18992f26/898286877/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170728_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Want+more+leadership+like+this+in+Congre&utm_campaign=WQEFE746N_digital_email_20170730_EOMPatty_inact&source=WQEFE746N_digital_email_20170730_EOMPatty_inact")**

Elsewhere on the Hill, Senator Dianne Feinstein has been relentless in her search for the truth surrounding Russia's interference in our election. She's not afraid of the Trump administration and threatened to issue a subpoena to get Donald Trump Jr. to testify before the Senate Judiciary Committee.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: This is frustrating
body:
#
Team --
Right now, our Republican opponent is fundraising by calling himself an "NRA Sellout." He thinks that's something to be proud of, as he runs for Governor in the state that endured the deadliest mass shooting in our nation's history.
I'm disgusted and frustrated by this lack of basic human decency. And I'm determined to make sure we don't end up with an NRA sellout in the Florida Governor's office. That's why I'm asking:
[**Will you chip in to our campaign before our critical end-of-month deadline tomorrow night?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32c4/9e00690/4c1c13fe/2403639e/1702506336/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170730-nra")
I'm not an NRA sellout -- in fact, I am one of the NRA's worst nightmares in Florida. When I refused to repeal a commonsense ordinance that banned firing guns in our public parks, so that our children could play in peace, the NRA supported a lawsuit against me. Their former national president lobbed constant attacks against me, and my career was threatened again and again by them.
But I persisted -- and we defeated the gun lobby twice in court.
If I'm elected as the next Governor of Florida, you can count on me to never sell out to the NRA -- and even better, I'll stand up to their absurd policies that put all of our families in danger.
[**Support our campaign for a safer Florida today by chipping in whatever you can afford before our end-of-month deadline >>**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32c4/9e00690/4c1c13fe/2403639e/1702506336/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170730-nra")
Together, we're going to fight back against the NRA, and ensure that their sellout candidates never make it to the Governor's office.
Bring it home,
Andrew

clean_body: Team -- Right now, our Republican opponent is fundraising by calling himself an "NRA Sellout." He thinks that's something to be proud of, as he runs for Governor in the state that endured the deadliest mass shooting in our nation's history. I'm disgusted and frustrated by this lack of basic human decency. And I'm determined to make sure we don't end up with an NRA sellout in the Florida Governor's office. That's why I'm asking: "" I'm not an NRA sellout -- in fact, I am one of the NRA's worst nightmares in Florida. When I refused to repeal a commonsense ordinance that banned firing guns in our public parks, so that our children could play in peace, the NRA supported a lawsuit against me. Their former national president lobbed constant attacks against me, and my career was threatened again and again by them. But I persisted -- and we defeated the gun lobby twice in court. If I'm elected as the next Governor of Florida, you can count on me to never sell out to the NRA -- and even better, I'll stand up to their absurd policies that put all of our families in danger.
